data.body: PASS-1 review note (T3 Integration feasibility): No findings. This plan integrates only INTERNAL, already-used rebar surfaces, so the overlay is largely not-applicable/PASS. Named subcommands verified to exist and MATCH: `rebar claim <id> [--force[=reason]]` (golden help tests/golden/cli_help/claim__dashhelp.out — atomic open→in_progress, exit 10 if taken, --force bypasses the gate), `rebar review-plan` / MCP `review_plan` (src/rebar/_cli/__init__.py:291,1199; src/rebar/llm/plan_review/), and `run_workflow` (src/rebar/__init__.py:590, mcp_server.py:839). The atomic-claim reuse, the fast LOCAL HMAC verify (no LLM/network), the --force audit comment, and the config preference (verify.require_plan_review_for_claim, default off) are already present in src/rebar/_commands/transition.py:634-695 and config.py:255 — so the asserted capabilities are achievable as described with no external auth/HTTPS preconditions. No SPIKE needed.
